General.Name: Bullpen Parlay Acquisition Co
General.Description: Bullpen Parlay Acquisition Company does not have significant operations. It intends to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more operating businesses or assets in the field of online real money gaming, technology, sports, digital media, hospitality, and leisure. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in San Francisco, California.
General.Address: 215 2nd Street, San Francisco, CA, United States, 94105
